test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient combined tactical coverage: existing delegation/source-inspection tests cover the live FBattleDisplay -> FBattleScreen -> FTacticalGame seam, the new FTacticalMineDamageFlowTest covers canonical post-move outcomes, and tester artifacts report 69/69 passing.
documentation_accuracy_summary: Mostly accurate, but doc/DesignNotes.md overstates that FTacticalMineDamageFlowTest directly exercises the full wx move-done seam; in practice that seam is covered by other tactical tests while the new test invokes FTacticalGame::completeMovePhase() directly.

findings.summary: doc/DesignNotes.md attributes end-to-end wx seam execution to FTacticalMineDamageFlowTest even though that test directly calls FTacticalGame::completeMovePhase().
